title: S-9.2: Dynamic /join/[room] route
description:
## Description

Create a Next.js App Router page that pre-fills room name from URL.

Implementation:
- `src/app/join/[room]/page.tsx` — reads `params.room`, passes to join form
- Or `src/app/join/page.tsx` using `searchParams.room` query param
- Room input pre-filled and disabled when param present
- Room input empty and editable when no param
- Uses `slugifyRoom()` from S-9.1 to normalize param
- Includes SocketProvider wrapper
- Shares avatar picker + username input from existing JoinForm

## Exit Condition

```bash
set -e
cd /Users/thom/10-19_projects/upidstay

test -f src/app/join/page.tsx || test -f "src/app/join/[room]/page.tsx"
pnpm build

pnpm run dev -- -p 3099 &
PID=$!
sleep 6

playwright-cli open http://localhost:3099/join/test-room
sleep 2

playwright-cli eval "document.querySelector('input[disabled]')?.value || document.querySelector('input[readonly]')?.value || ''" > /tmp/pw-join-room.txt 2>&1
grep -qi "test-room" /tmp/pw-join-room.txt

playwright-cli goto http://localhost:3099/join
sleep 1
playwright-cli eval "document.querySelectorAll('input:not([disabled]):not([readonly])').length" > /tmp/pw-join-count.txt 2>&1
python3 -c "assert int(open('/tmp/pw-join-count.txt').read().strip()) >= 2, 'Expected ≥2 editable inputs'"

playwright-cli close
kill $PID 2>/dev/null
rm -f /tmp/pw-join-room.txt /tmp/pw-join-count.txt
```
close_reason: Dynamic /join/[room] route with pre-filled disabled room input, plus /join with editable inputs

title: S-9.3: Copy link / Invite button in chat header
description:
## Description

Add an "Invite" button to the chat room header that copies a shareable join link.

Implementation:
- Add button with `aria-label="Invite"` to chat-room.tsx header
- On click: generate URL `${window.location.origin}/join/${slugifyRoom(room)}`
- Copy to clipboard via `navigator.clipboard.writeText()`
- Show toast "Link copied!" for 2s (simple state-based div, not a library)
- Style as small icon button (link/share icon) fitting kid-friendly design

## Exit Condition

```bash
set -e
cd /Users/thom/10-19_projects/upidstay

grep -qE "Invite|invite|aria-label.*[Ii]nvite" src/components/chat-room.tsx
pnpm build

pnpm run dev -- -p 3099 &
PID=$!
sleep 6

playwright-cli open http://localhost:3099
sleep 2

# Join a room
playwright-cli eval "
  const inputs = document.querySelectorAll('.kid-input');
  if (inputs[0]) { inputs[0].value = 'TestKid'; inputs[0].dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles:true})); }
  if (inputs[1]) { inputs[1].value = 'invite-test'; inputs[1].dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles:true})); }
"
sleep 1
playwright-cli eval "document.querySelector('.big-button')?.click()"
sleep 2
playwright-cli snapshot

# Verify invite button exists
playwright-cli eval "!!document.querySelector('[aria-label=\"Invite\"]') || Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).some(b => b.textContent.includes('Invite'))" > /tmp/pw-has-invite.txt 2>&1
grep -q "true" /tmp/pw-has-invite.txt

playwright-cli close
kill $PID 2>/dev/null
rm -f /tmp/pw-has-invite.txt
```

title: S-9.4: Native share API with fallback
description:
## Description

Create a share utility that uses native share API on mobile, clipboard on desktop.

Implementation:
- `src/lib/share.ts` exports `shareRoom(roomSlug: string): Promise<void>`
- If `navigator.share` exists: call with `{ title: "Join my Pig Latin room!", url: <join-url> }`
- If not: fall back to `navigator.clipboard.writeText(url)`
- Wire into the Invite button from S-9.3 (replace direct clipboard call)
- `src/lib/share.test.ts`:
  - Test 1: mock `navigator.share` → verify called with correct payload
  - Test 2: delete `navigator.share` → verify `clipboard.writeText` called with URL
  - Test 3: verify URL format is `<origin>/join/<slug>`

## Exit Condition

```bash
set -e
cd /Users/thom/10-19_projects/upidstay

test -f src/lib/share.ts
test -f src/lib/share.test.ts
grep -qE "navigator.share|vi.fn|mock" src/lib/share.test.ts

pnpm test -- --run src/lib/share.test.ts
pnpm build
```

title: S-9.1: Room name slugification utility
description:
## Description

Create `src/lib/slugify.ts` exporting `slugifyRoom(name: string): string`.

Rules:
- Lowercase, trim whitespace
- Replace spaces with hyphens
- Strip non-alphanumeric chars (except hyphens)
- Strip emoji (Unicode > U+FFFF)
- Collapse multiple consecutive hyphens
- Idempotent (slugifying a slug returns same slug)
- Throw on empty/whitespace-only input

Create `src/lib/slugify.test.ts` with ≥ 8 test cases:
- `"Rainbow Party!"` → `"rainbow-party"`
- `"hello world"` → `"hello-world"`
- `"  spaces  "` → `"spaces"`
- `"UPPERCASE"` → `"uppercase"`
- `"special@#chars!"` → `"specialchars"`
- `"emoji 🎉 room"` → `"emoji-room"`
- `"already-slugged"` → `"already-slugged"`
- `""` → throws

## Exit Condition

```bash
set -e
cd /Users/thom/10-19_projects/upidstay

test -f src/lib/slugify.ts
test -f src/lib/slugify.test.ts
grep -qE "expect\(.*\)\." src/lib/slugify.test.ts

pnpm test -- --run src/lib/slugify.test.ts
pnpm build
```
close_reason: Slugify utility + 10 test cases, all passing
